headline: Moody's (NYSE:MCO) Posts Better-Than-Expected Sales In Q2 CY2026
summary: Credit rating agency Moody's (NYSE:MCO) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 15.1% year on year to $2.19 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $4.68 per share was 10% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
